## Feature Summary

- What feature or enhancement is being added?

## Problem Statement

- What user or developer problem does this solve?

## Scope

- [ ] Extension
- [ ] Runtime

## Validation

- [ ] Extension build passes (`cd extension && npm ci && npm run build`)
- [ ] Runtime tests pass (`cd runtime && go test ./...`)
- [ ] Key feature scenarios verified manually

## Risks And Rollout Notes

- Any migration, compatibility, or rollout concerns?
